_doc: Σ₀ local-model adapter registry. Operator-editable overlay onto the built-in defaults in apps/lantern-garage/lib/local-model-registry.js (merged by id, TTL-cached ~60s). See docs/SIGMA0-MODEL-ADAPTER.md. Ouro is the Σ₀-native default; set LOCAL_CAPABILITY_FIRST=1 to let the best-fitting capability model (Qwen) lead coding. vramGB gates against the box (VRAM_BUDGET_GB, default 8).

models.note: Σ₀-native default — Ouro-1.4B looped coder; Q-exit IS the thesis (arXiv 2510.25741).
Keystone kernel fine-tune of Ouro (kernel chain lead, #894).
Opt-in capability lever: Qwen2.5-Coder-7B (Q4_K_M ~4.7GB). Wrapped by loopedReason() since it does not self-converge. `ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:7b`, then LOCAL_CAPABILITY_FIRST=1.
Dream/RP-tuned model — Three Doors surface only (never a tool assistant).
